name: Chunyang He
headline: M.Sc. Student | Bioinformatics x AI for Genomics
objective: To integrate AI and bioinformatics through knowledge graphs and deep learning, with a focus on multimodal biological data integration, genetic regulation of complex traits, and precision discovery in agriculture or healthcare.

education.degree: M.Sc. Student, Fruit Tree Breeding & Genomics
notes: Direct-entry master's program admitted via undergraduate interview
Core courses: Python 96, Probability 95, Linear Algebra 91, Smart Agriculture Data Analysis 94

experience.title: High-Throughput Root Phenomics Platform for Tea Germplasm Evaluation
highlights: Analyzed 627 re-sequenced tea genomes to build high-confidence SNP catalogue
Mapped genes regulating secondary metabolites via GWAS
Built a PyTorch ResNet-34 model for automatic leaf phenotyping (81.5% accuracy)

experience.title: Temperature-Driven Regulation of Ascorbic Acid in Lettuce
highlights: Built temperature-gradient system with strong ascorbic acid response
Identified 4 key pathways and 4 candidate genes via transcriptomics
Manuscript submitted to Horticultural Plant Journal

experience.title: Functional Characterisation of AbCOMT1 against Citrus Canker
highlights: Cloned AbCOMT1 from resistant Atalantia buxifolia cultivar
Generated over-expression lines in sweet orange
Published in Journal of Pineal Research

experience.title: Automated Phenotyping Platform for Citrus Fruit Morphology
highlights: Benchmarked segmentation models and YOLO variants
3D reconstruction with Gaussian Splatting; key traits reached Pearson r > 0.90

publications: [S.1] Effects of temperature on L-Ascorbic acid metabolism in horticultural plants. Submitted.
[S.2] SA-dependent immunity between citrus and Candidatus Liberibacter asiaticus. Submitted to Cell.
[J.1] COMT gene in melatonin biosynthesis mediating resistance to citrus canker. Journal of Pineal Research.
[S.3] PhenoCitrus: automated platform for citrus fruit morphology phenotyping. In preparation.
awards: First Prize, Hundred Students Forum Campus Competition (2021)
Third Prize, Challenge Cup Provincial Competition (2023)
